response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and open-source development experience with a focus on testability and modern tooling, but lacks the depth of C++ and large-scale cloud compute infrastructure experience explicitly required for this role. His leadership and mentoring background is present but not directly aligned with cloud or DevOps engineering.
strengths: Proven leadership and mentoring experience through workshops, talks, and open-source contributions.
Diverse technical background with exposure to distributed systems, real-time data processing, and infrastructure tooling.
Strong focus on software craftsmanship, testing, and developer tooling (e.g., CI/CD, TDD).
concerns: Only limited C++ experience (primarily at National Instruments, 2014–2015), falling short of the 8-year requirement.
No explicit cloud compute platform or production-level cloud architecture experience mentioned.
Technical leadership roles have been more collaborative than strategic (e.g., no direct reports or ownership of large-scale cloud projects).
